title: C-TEC YOUTH SERVICES - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT C-TEC YOUTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance to the emerging workforce to assist in preparing to be successful in education and employment. Services include assistance with career planning, training, work experience, National Career Readiness Certificate, and job finding. 13455 SE 97th Avenue Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Ages 14-24 who are eligible to work in the United States and meet low-income requirements Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (located on the Clackamas Community College campus) Email (503) 594-3964 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (503) 594-3964 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:30pm Services: Youth Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START TO SUCCESS EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOL EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SPECIAL EDUCATION PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION/EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
